violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Lower shelving to prep counters/tables in kitchen area have a build up of dust/debris and need detail cleaning.

Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed or maintained on faucet as required. Faucet at 3 tub sink has back flow preventer removed to connect water line for chemical dispenser.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have a build up of debris under equipment/shelving in kitchen area and needs detail cleaning. Wall behind cooking equipment in kitchen has build up and needs cleaning.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers, customer service microwave, and prep counter lower shelving in kitchen have accumulation of food debris and need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving under counters in kitchen and cabinets at self service area need cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood and filters in kitchen need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in walk in units and in kitchen area have an accumulation of debris under equipment and shelving units. In need of cleaning.
